narrative.headline: What 2016 Ford Escape owners report most
narrative.summary: Power train complaints dominate owner reports, with drivers describing chattering, vibration, and rough engagement when shifting between reverse and drive. Engine-related reports cluster around sudden, complete power loss at speed accompanied by rough running and loss of acceleration. Electrical and camera system faults round out the picture, with owners noting intermittent warning lights and unreliable backup-camera displays.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report chattering and vibration when shifting from reverse to drive, along with a banging sensation when applying the accelerator from a stopped position. · 1 fire · 5 crash · 8 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report sudden, complete loss of power while driving at both low and high speeds, accompanied by rough running, inability to accelerate, and a hill-assist warning message. · 6 fire · 3 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Back Over Prevention
issues.blurb: Owners report the rear camera failing intermittently, alongside erratic behavior from the radio and display screen. · 3 crash

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report a check engine light that cycles on and off unpredictably on streets and highways, with the vehicle requiring extended shop visits including computer module replacement. · 3 fire · 1 crash · 1 injured
